title: Disillusion.
content:
Those unrequited in their love who die
    Have never drained life's chief illusion dry.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Madison Julius Cawein, titled "Disillusion.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
